description: Late accounts mentioning a variety of incoming payments and goods (many recto entries state "מן קוסטא" but it is unclear whether this should be read as Istanbul/Costa[ndina]). Dated as 17 Adar II J[umada] II 1236 AH (March 1821 CE). A wide variety of payments and coinage types are listed, as well as a couple names: Azulay Suares, Aḥmad Khadr. On the verso, the latter person is mentioned as a "ṣarrāf al-ajlāll." MCD.
description_he: רשימה או טבלה ביהודית-ערבית. מוחזק בכיא פריז.
